# CounterLine: An Engine-Tested Opening Repertoire {.unnumbered}

**Two precise opening lines — validated against Stockfish 18 on a published fixed suite**

*The CounterLine Project — 2026*

---

CounterLine is a repertoire for serious chess players who want two reliable weapons — one for White, one for Black — that they can study deeply and trust for years of serious play.

The White line (Vienna Gambit Accepted) reaches a position that is nearly 100% winning for White. The Black line (Caro-Kann Classical 4...Bf5) scored 53.75% in testing — including wins as Black — from a position where most engines settle for a draw.

These are not theoretical novelties found by a grandmaster. They are the product of a systematic, automated search through 28 candidate openings, refined by empirical testing, and validated in a 9-match proof matrix with full PGN records.

**Who this book is for:**

- **Ambitious intermediates** ready for their first serious, cohesive opening system
- **Competitive club players** preparing two reliable weapons for tournament play
- **Titled grinders** who want engine-validated lines with clear post-opening plans
- **Elite lab users** who want to see the proof data and specialist tuning details

**What this book will teach you:**

- The exact moves of the CounterLine repertoire, from move 1
- The plans, patterns, and key positions you need to memorise
- Annotated model games from engine-vs-engine matches
- How to handle opponent deviations
- Training drills and quick-reference cheat sheets
- The precise boundaries of what has been tested — and what has not

**What this book will not claim:**

- That CounterLine "beats" Stockfish in general play
- That this repertoire works outside the published fixed suite
- That these results transfer to all time controls, hardware, or human play
- That 40-game matches constitute proof at 95% statistical confidence

Honest engineering. Transparent boundaries. Real, reproducible results.

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Evidence Status
All claims in this book are sourced from the project's claims manifest. CounterLine Combined scored 52.50% against Stockfish 18 on the published fixed suite (+17 Elo estimate, LOS ~93%). This is a positive trend from 40-game matches with ±23 Elo error bars — meaningful but below the 95% confidence threshold. See @sec-proof-boundaries for full details.
:::

**License:** This work is distributed as part of the CounterLine project under GPL-3.0.
